title: Incorrect Anti Join Result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c0 INT, c1 VARCHAR(10), c2 DATE);
INSERT INTO t2(c0, c1, c2) VALUES(1, 'test', '2023-01-01');
CREATE TABLE t3(c0 INT, c1 FLOAT);
SELECT t2.c0 FROM t2 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t3 WHERE t2.c1 IS NOT NULL);
key_bug_features: Anti join with NOT EXISTS condition on non-existent column
